fact_nuggets.text: Huge Power (Japanese: Muscleman) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation VI, it was the signature Ability of Marill's evolutionary line.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Occasionally boosts Attack. MD T D S Occasionally boosts the Pokemon's Attack. B S L MD GtI Sometimes increases the power of physical moves. * Sometimes the power of the Pokemon's physical moves will go up! * S MD Sometimes the power of the Pokemon's physical moves goes up! MD RT DX Sometimes the power of the Pokemon's physical moves goes up.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power doubles the Attack stat of the Pokemon with this Ability. Because it is an Attack modifier and not a stat stage change, it will double the user's effective Attack stat when using Foul Play or Body Press . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power also affects self-inflicted confusion damage. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power no longer affects confusion damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power has no effect outside of battle.
